channel.title: React on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in React on Arrans github.io

item.title: vercel/ai-chatbot
item.description: A full-featured, hackable Next.js AI chatbot built by Vercel

item.title: appwrite/appwrite
item.description: Your backend, minus the hassle.

item.title: shadcn-ui/ui
item.description: A set of beautifully-designed, accessible components and a code distribution platform. Works with your favorite frameworks. Open Source. Open Code.

item.title: outline/outline
item.description: The fastest knowledge base for growing teams. Beautiful, realtime collaborative, feature packed, and markdown compatible.

item.title: makeplane/plane
item.description: 🔥 🔥 🔥 Open Source JIRA, Linear, Monday, and Asana Alternative. Plane helps you track your issues, epics, and cycles the easiest way on the planet.

item.title: preactjs/preact
item.description: ⚛️ Fast 3kB React alternative with the same modern API. Components & Virtual DOM.

item.title: BuilderIO/micro-agent
item.description: An AI agent that writes (actually useful) code for you

item.title: facebook/docusaurus
item.description: Easy to maintain open source documentation websites.

item.title: mattermost/mattermost
item.description: Mattermost is an open source platform for secure collaboration across the entire software development lifecycle..

item.title: ritz078/transform
item.description: A polyglot web converter.

item.title: getlago/lago
item.description: Open Source Metering and Usage Based Billing API ⭐️ Consumption tracking, Subscription management, Pricing iterations, Payment orchestration & Revenue analytics

item.title: usememos/memos
item.description: An open-source, lightweight note-taking solution. The pain-less way to create your meaningful notes. Your Notes, Your Way.

item.title: AykutSarac/jsoncrack.com
item.description: ✨ Innovative and open-source visualization application that transforms various data formats, such as JSON, YAML, XML, CSV and more, into interactive graphs.

item.title: NativeScript/NativeScript
item.description: ⚡ Empowering JavaScript with native platform APIs. ✨ Best of all worlds (TypeScript, Swift, Objective C, Kotlin, Java, Dart). Use what you love ❤️ Angular, React, Solid, Svelte, Vue with: iOS (UIKit, SwiftUI), Android (View, Jetpack Compose), Dart (Flutter) and you name it compatible.

item.title: spliit-app/spliit
item.description: Free and Open Source Alternative to Splitwise. Share expenses with your friends and family.

item.title: evanw/esbuild
item.description: An extremely fast bundler for the web

item.description: whiteboard SDK / infinite canvas SDK

item.description: A React Framework for building internal tools, admin panels, dashboards & B2B apps with unmatched flexibility.

item.title: wailsapp/wails

item.description: A simple server for sending and receiving messages in real-time per WebSocket. (Includes a sleek web-ui)

item.title: hexops/vecty
item.description: Vecty lets you build responsive and dynamic web frontends in Go using WebAssembly, competing with modern web frameworks like React & VueJS.

item.title: dittofeed/dittofeed
item.description: Open-source customer engagement. Automate transactional and marketing messages across email, SMS, mobile push, WhatsApp, Slack, and more 📨

item.title: codesandbox/codesandbox-client
item.description: An online IDE for rapid web development

item.title: typicode/mistcss
item.description: Create visual components for React without JavaScript or TypeScript. Leverage native HTML and CSS. It’s an alternative to CSS-in-JS and CSS modules.

item.title: jvatic/goja-babel
item.description: Run babel transforms using Go to transpile your modern JavaScript and JSX.

item.description: Klipse is a JavaScript plugin for embedding interactive code snippets in tech blogs.
